meaning: n.由第三者保存附带条件委付盖印的契约
examples: They had $96,000 in their escrow account.
His stake has been held in escrow since the start of the year.
The bank has already paid the money into an escrow account.
One participant was instructed to wire her payment to an account in the name of Delaware Escrow Co.
That sale will provide money for the escrow fund from which damages will be paid.
